General.Name: Beisen Holding Ltd
General.Description: Beisen Holding Limited, an investment holding company, provides cloud-based human capital management (HCM) solutions for enterprises in the People's Republic of China. The company operates iTalentX platform that delivers cloud-based HCM solutions to recruit, evaluate, manage, develop, and retain talents. It also provides professional services; and employee stock holding platform. Beisen Holding Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.

2.Name: Ms. Xianna  Liu
2.Title: CFO, Joint Company Secretary & Executive Director
